text: HDB Hub: Corenet X Feedback from Consultants 18 May 2026 1. NEA – requires the Fire Truck’s movement to be modelled in 3D 2. SCDF – requires the access to be modelled in 3D (similar to NEA) 3. PUB – may require 2D drawings for Drainage, because drainage can be tricky to model along the existing terrain, and Design Gateway is too early a stage for detailed planning of surface drainage. 4. RWDP – require the drainage pipes and connection to the storm water drain (RWDP scope is Architectural; the connection is MEP scope) to be modelled in 3D. Coordination required early on. 5. HDB’s direction - Settle design first using Basic modelling & 2D, once the design is firm then you can use detailed BIM. Transition Time may allowed for that transition of 3-6 months. (That depends on - How much time is

. Transition Time may allowed for that transition of 3-6 months. (That depends on - How much time is given during Design, for design confirmation? Private developers give less time to confirm design, compared to HDB (public sector clients).
